name: hex
description: Hexagonal Architecture framework for LLM-driven development with token-efficient tree-sitter summaries

scripts.build: bun build src/cli.ts --outfile dist/cli.js --target node --format esm && bun build src/index.ts --outfile dist/index.js --target node --format esm && cp node_modules/web-tree-sitter/tree-sitter.wasm dist/tree-sitter.wasm 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.test: bun test $(find tests/unit tests/property tests/smoke -name '*.test.ts' ! -name 'dashboard-adapter.test.ts' ! -name 'hub-launcher.test.ts' 2>/dev/null) && bun test tests/unit/dashboard-adapter.test.ts && bun test tests/unit/hub-launcher.test.ts
scripts.test:all: bun test $(find tests/unit tests/property tests/smoke -name '*.test.ts' ! -name 'dashboard-adapter.test.ts' ! -name 'hub-launcher.test.ts' 2>/dev/null) && bun test tests/unit/dashboard-adapter.test.ts && bun test tests/unit/hub-launcher.test.ts && bun test tests/integration/ && bun test tests/e2e/
scripts.postinstall: cd node_modules/agentdb/dist && ln -sf src/controllers controllers 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build && bun test
